revision.comment: [[WP:AES|←]]Created page with '<includeonly>{{documentation | content = {{Collapsible option|state={{{1|{{{state|autocollapse}}}}}}}} {{{2|}}} }}</includeonly><noinclude>== Explanation == Thi...'
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{documentation
 | content =
{{Collapsible option|state={{{1|{{{state|autocollapse}}}}}}}}
{{{2|}}}
}}</includeonly><noinclude>== Explanation ==
This is a wrapper for {{tl|Collapsible option}} to provide a semblance of documentation for navbox templates.
__NOTOC__
{{documentation|content={{Collapsible option/doc}}
== TemplateData ==
<templatedata>
{
	"params": {
		"2": {
			"label": "Content",
			"description": "Usage, TemplateData, etc.",
			"type": "content"
		},
		"state": {
			"aliases": [
				"1"
			],
			"label": "State",
			"description": "Set to either: (1) expand, (2) collapse, or (3) autocollapse",
			"example": "collapse",
			"type": "boolean",
			"default": "autocollapse",
			"autovalue": "",
			"suggested": true
		}
	},
	"description": "This is a wrapper for {{Collapsible option}} to provide a semblance of documentation for navbox templates."
}
</templatedata>
}}
</noinclude>

revision.comment: add extra material
revision.text:
<onlyinclude>{{documentation
 | content =
{{Template display|nomobile}}
{{{2|}}}
This is a [[Wikipedia:Navigation template|navigational template]] created using {{tl|navbox}}. It can be [[Help:Transclusion|transcluded]] on pages by placing <nowiki>{{</nowiki>{{{template|{{PAGENAME}}}}}<nowiki>}}</nowiki> below the [[Wikipedia:Manual of Style/Layout#Standard appendices and footers|standard article appendices]].

{{Collapsible option|parameter_name={{{parameter_name|state}}}|default={{{1|{{{state|autocollapse}}}}}}}}
{{{3|}}}
}}</onlyinclude><noinclude>
{{documentation|content=
== Explanation ==
This is a wrapper for {{tl|Collapsible option}} to provide a semblance of documentation for navbox templates.
__NOTOC__
{{Collapsible option/doc}}
== TemplateData ==
<templatedata>
{
	"params": {
		"2": {
			"label": "Top content",
			"description": "Hatnotes, Usage, etc. (above {{collapsible option}} but below {{Template display|nomobile}})",
			"type": "content"
		},
		"3": {
			"label": "Content",
			"description": "TemplateData, See also, etc. (below {{collapsible option}})",
			"type": "content"
		},
		"state": {
			"aliases": [
				"1"
			],
			"label": "State",
			"description": "Set to either: (1) expand, (2) collapse, or (3) autocollapse",
			"example": "collapse",
			"type": "boolean",
			"default": "autocollapse",
			"suggested": true
		},
		"template": {
			"label": "Template",
			"description": "To call the template anything other than {{PAGENAME}} within the documentation",
			"type": "string",
			"autovalue": "{{PAGENAME}}"
		}
	},
	"description": "This is a wrapper for {{Collapsible option}} to provide a semblance of documentation for navbox templates."
}
</templatedata>
}}
</noinclude>

revision.comment: Add new parameter, |stateless=, which suppresses {{collapsible option}} on templates that have a fixed state
revision.text:
<onlyinclude>{{documentation
 | content =
{{Template display|nomobile}}
{{{2|}}}
This is a [[Wikipedia:Navigation template|navigational template]] created using {{tl|navbox}}. It can be [[Help:Transclusion|transcluded]] on pages by placing <nowiki>{{</nowiki>{{{template|{{PAGENAME}}}}}<nowiki>}}</nowiki> below the [[Wikipedia:Manual of Style/Layout#Standard appendices and footers|standard article appendices]].

{{#if:{{{stateless|}}}||{{Collapsible option|parameter_name={{{parameter_name|state}}}|default={{{1|{{{state|autocollapse}}}}}}}}}}
{{{3|}}}
}}</onlyinclude><noinclude>
{{documentation|content=
== Explanation ==
This is a wrapper for {{tl|Collapsible option}} to provide a semblance of documentation for navbox templates. The <nowiki>{{Collapsible option}}</nowiki> template can be suppressed with {{para|stateless|yes}}.
__NOTOC__
{{Collapsible option/doc}}
== TemplateData ==
<templatedata>
{
	"params": {
		"2": {
			"label": "Top content",
			"description": "Hatnotes, Usage, etc. (above {{collapsible option}} but below {{Template display|nomobile}})",
			"type": "content"
		},
		"3": {
			"label": "Content",
			"description": "TemplateData, See also, etc. (below {{collapsible option}})",
			"type": "content"
		},
		"state": {
			"aliases": [
				"1"
			],
			"label": "State",
			"description": "Set to either: (1) expand, (2) collapse, or (3) autocollapse",
			"example": "collapse",
			"type": "boolean",
			"default": "autocollapse",
			"suggested": true
		},
		"template": {
			"label": "Template",
			"description": "To call the template anything other than {{PAGENAME}} within the documentation",
			"type": "string",
			"autovalue": "{{PAGENAME}}"
		},
		"stateless": {
			"label": "Stateless",
			"description": "Hides the {{Collapsible option}} transclusion for when the navbox doesn't support a state.",
			"example": "yes",
			"autovalue": "yes"
		}
	},
	"description": "This is a wrapper for {{Collapsible option}} to provide a semblance of documentation for navbox templates."
}
</templatedata>
}}
{{Sandbox other||
[[Category:Navbox meta-templates|Δ]]
[[Category:Documentation shared content templates]]
}}
</noinclude>

revision.comment: Add templatedata to the transclusions of this template (yes, that means there are two templatedata blocks here — hopefully that doesn't create any trash fires)
revision.text:
<onlyinclude>{{documentation
 | content =
{{Template display|nomobile}}
{{{2|}}}
This is a [[Wikipedia:Navigation template|navigational template]] created using {{tl|navbox}}. It can be [[Help:Transclusion|transcluded]] on pages by placing <nowiki>{{</nowiki>{{{template|{{PAGENAME}}}}}<nowiki>}}</nowiki> below the [[Wikipedia:Manual of Style/Layout#Standard appendices and footers|standard article appendices]].

{{#if:{{{stateless|}}}||==Initial visibility==
{{Collapsible option|parameter_name={{{parameter_name|state}}}|default={{{1|{{{state|autocollapse}}}}}}}}

==TemplateData==
<templatedata>
{
	"params": {
		"state": {
			"label": "State",
			"description": "The initial visibility of the template",
			"suggestedvalues": [
				"collapsed",
				"expanded",
				"autocollapse"
			],
			"suggested": true
		}
	},
	"description": "A navigational box that can be placed at the bottom of articles."
}
</templatedata>
}}
{{{3|}}}
}}</onlyinclude><noinclude>
{{documentation|content=
== Explanation ==
This is a wrapper for {{tl|Collapsible option}} to provide a semblance of documentation for navbox templates. The <nowiki>{{Collapsible option}}</nowiki> template can be suppressed with {{para|stateless|yes}}.
__NOTOC__
{{Collapsible option/doc}}
== TemplateData ==
<templatedata>
{
	"params": {
		"2": {
			"label": "Top content",
			"description": "Hatnotes, Usage, etc. (above {{collapsible option}} but below {{Template display|nomobile}})",
			"type": "content"
		},
		"3": {
			"label": "Content",
			"description": "TemplateData, See also, etc. (below {{collapsible option}})",
			"type": "content"
		},
		"state": {
			"aliases": [
				"1"
			],
			"label": "State",
			"description": "Set to either: (1) expand, (2) collapse, or (3) autocollapse",
			"example": "collapse",
			"type": "boolean",
			"default": "autocollapse",
			"suggested": true
		},
		"template": {
			"label": "Template",
			"description": "To call the template anything other than {{PAGENAME}} within the documentation",
			"type": "string",
			"autovalue": "{{PAGENAME}}"
		},
		"stateless": {
			"label": "Stateless",
			"description": "Hides the {{Collapsible option}} transclusion for when the navbox doesn't support a state.",
			"example": "yes",
			"autovalue": "yes"
		}
	},
	"description": "This is a wrapper for {{Collapsible option}} to provide a semblance of documentation for navbox templates."
}
</templatedata>
}}
{{Sandbox other||
[[Category:Navbox meta-templates|Δ]]
[[Category:Documentation shared content templates]]
}}
</noinclude>

revision.comment: Add a notice to make this hopefully a bit less confusing.
revision.text:
<onlyinclude>{{documentation
 | content =
{{Template display|nomobile}}
{{{2|}}}
This is a [[Wikipedia:Navigation template|navigational template]] created using {{tl|navbox}}. It can be [[Help:Transclusion|transcluded]] on pages by placing <nowiki>{{</nowiki>{{{template|{{PAGENAME}}}}}<nowiki>}}</nowiki> below the [[Wikipedia:Manual of Style/Layout#Standard appendices and footers|standard article appendices]].

{{#if:{{{stateless|}}}||==Initial visibility==
{{Collapsible option|parameter_name={{{parameter_name|state}}}|default={{{1|{{{state|autocollapse}}}}}}}}

==TemplateData==
<templatedata>
{
	"params": {
		"state": {
			"label": "State",
			"description": "The initial visibility of the navbox",
			"suggestedvalues": [
				"collapsed",
				"expanded",
				"autocollapse"
			],
			"suggested": true
		}
	},
	"description": "A navigational box that can be placed at the bottom of articles."
}
</templatedata>
}}
{{{3|}}}
}}</onlyinclude><noinclude>
{{documentation|content=
{{notice|The stuff in the box above is the documentation that this template produces. '''This is the documentation for {{t|Navbox documentation}}''', i.e. the documentation for the documentation.}}
== Explanation ==
This is a wrapper for {{tl|Collapsible option}} to provide a semblance of documentation for navbox templates. The <nowiki>{{Collapsible option}}</nowiki> template can be suppressed with {{para|stateless|yes}}.
__NOTOC__
{{Collapsible option/doc}}
== TemplateData ==
<templatedata>
{
	"params": {
		"2": {
			"label": "Top content",
			"description": "Hatnotes, Usage, etc. (above {{collapsible option}} but below {{Template display|nomobile}})",
			"type": "content"
		},
		"3": {
			"label": "Content",
			"description": "TemplateData, See also, etc. (below {{collapsible option}})",
			"type": "content"
		},
		"state": {
			"aliases": [
				"1"
			],
			"label": "State",
			"description": "Set to either: (1) expand, (2) collapse, or (3) autocollapse",
			"example": "collapse",
			"type": "boolean",
			"default": "autocollapse",
			"suggested": true
		},
		"template": {
			"label": "Template",
			"description": "To call the template anything other than {{PAGENAME}} within the documentation",
			"type": "string",
			"autovalue": "{{PAGENAME}}"
		},
		"stateless": {
			"label": "Stateless",
			"description": "Hides the {{Collapsible option}} transclusion for when the navbox doesn't support a state.",
			"example": "yes",
			"autovalue": "yes"
		}
	},
	"description": "This is a wrapper for {{Collapsible option}} to provide a semblance of documentation for navbox templates."
}
</templatedata>
}}
{{Sandbox other||
[[Category:Navbox meta-templates|Δ]]
[[Category:Documentation shared content templates]]
}}
</noinclude>

It can be [[Help:Transclusion|transcluded]] on pages by placing {{{{{template|{{PAGENAME}}}}}}} below the [[Wikipedia:Manual of Style/Layout#Standard appendices and footers|standard article appendices]]. {{#if:{{{stateless|}}}|| ==Initial visibility== {{Collapsible option|parameter_name={{{parameter_name|state}}}|default={{{1|{{{state|autocollapse}}}}}}|nobase={{{nobase|}}}}} {{Navbox visibility}} ==TemplateData== { "params": { "state": { "label": "State", "description": "The initial visibility of the navbox", "suggestedvalues": [ "collapsed", "expanded", "autocollapse" ], "suggested": true, "type": "string" } }, "description": "A navigational box that can be placed at the bottom of articles." } }} ==Template transclusions== {{Check completeness of transclusions}} {{{3|}}} }}
{{Documentation}}

revision.comment: 「[[Template:Navbox documentation]]」を保護しました: [[Wikipedia:保護依頼]]による: [[WP:HRT|影響が特に大きいテンプレート]]に基づき、無期限の編集半保護・移動拡張半保護 ([編集=自動承認された利用者のみ許可] (無期限) [移動=拡張承認された利用者と管理者に許可] (無期限))
revision.text:
{{Documentation | 1 = Template:Navbox documentation | content = {{{hatnotes|}}} {{Template display|nomobile}} {{{intro|{{{2|}}}}}} このテンプレートは、{{Tl|Navbox}}により作成された[[Wikipedia:ナビゲーションテンプレート|ナビゲーションテンプレート]]です。[[Wikipedia:スタイルマニュアル/レイアウト#テンプレート|記事の下部]]に{{{{{Template|{{PAGENAME}}}}}}}を置くことで[[Help:テンプレート#テンプレートを呼び出す|トランスクルージョン]]されます。 {{#if:{{{stateless|}}}|| ==初期表示設定== {{Collapsible option|parameter_name={{{parameter_name|state}}}|default={{{1|{{{state|autocollapse}}}}}}|nobase={{{nobase|}}}}} {{Navbox visibility}} ==TemplateData== { "params": { "state": { "label": "State", "description": "初期表示設定", "suggestedvalues": [ "collapsed", "expanded", "autocollapse" ], "suggested": true, "type": "string" } }, "description": "記事の下部に置くことができるナビゲーションテンプレート" } }} ==テンプレートのトランスクルージョン== {{Check completeness of transclusions}} {{{3|}}} }}
{{Documentation}}
